note: Gap ledger only. It does not mark PEI gates complete and does not modify source ledgers.

remaining_evidence_needs: sourced company facts and business drivers
official filings/IR, revenue, earnings, or management commentary
key debates, catalysts, risks, disconfirming evidence, and monitoring items
checklist: research_status=complete only if sourced initiating coverage is complete
each research_underwrite.source_register record has source/source_name/url/file_path and as_of or retrieved_at
investment_horizon.source_register covers near_term_3m, base_12m, and long_term_3y

remaining_evidence_needs: peer set or relevant sector method
checklist: valuation_status=complete only after sourced valuation work
valuation.methods non-empty with peer/sector method, inputs, source dates, and gaps
each valuation.methods record has method, source/source_name/url/file_path, and as_of or retrieved_at

remaining_evidence_needs: convert risk inputs into implementation readiness
set binding constraint, liquidity cap, recommended size, max-loss posture, and monitoring rules
checklist: risk_status=complete only after sourced portfolio-risk-management work
each risk_assessment.evidence record has source/source_name/url/file_path and as_of or retrieved_at
